## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client progress and reallocate tasks due to a team member's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Kavishka's Absence:** Due to a family emergency, Kavishka is out. Hassan will complete urgent tasks for Field Guide today, and Lawrence will take over article generation for Enable and SpecterOps to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Client Strategy Presentations:** Aida is presenting strategies to U.com and Fleet Device Management today. She will also present the content OS to Enable and Bubble.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Enable Gated Content:** Aida proposed repurposing a client report into a gated PDF. GrowthX can write the content; client design support is needed, or GrowthX can provide it with a 2–3 week lead time.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Bubble Content Generation:** Tamara will begin generating articles this week, prioritizing high-volume, top-of-funnel topics. The first draft is due Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

## Topics

### Team & Task Reallocation
